body: Dr. Meera, JIDA's Oct issue landed. One item relevant to your 124 high-risk adult patients — 2,100-patient trial showed 3-month fluoride recall cuts caries recurrence 38% better than 6-month. Worth a 2-min read. Want me to pull the abstract + draft a patient-ed WhatsApp you can share this week? — JIDA Oct 2026 p.14
rationale: Research digest with merchant-specific anchor (high-risk adult cohort count); curiosity + reciprocity levers; clinical peer tone; specificity on trial size, delta, and source page.

body: Dr. Meera, DCI revised radiograph dose limits — new standard: 70 kVp + rectangular collimation for bitewings. Deadline for equipment compliance: 15 Dec 2026. Clinics found non-compliant face licence review. Main ek short checklist draft kar sakti hoon jo aap apne X-ray operator ko de sakein — 5-minute review. Reply YES?
rationale: Regulation change with specific deadline and penalty framing; effort externalization (checklist ready to draft); loss aversion on licence risk; Hindi-English mix per language preference.

body: Hi Priya, Dr. Meera's clinic here 🦷 It's been 5 months since your last visit — your 6-month cleaning recall is due. Apke liye 2 slots ready hain: Wed 5 Nov, 6pm ya Thu 6 Nov, 5pm. ₹299 cleaning + complimentary fluoride varnish. Reply 1 for Wed, 2 for Thu, or tell us a time that works better.
rationale: Customer-facing recall with real slots + price + add-on; Hindi-English mix per language preference; warm clinical tone; specific date+time anchors; low-friction multi-choice CTA.

body: Dr. Bharat, quick check — your calls dropped 35% week-on-week (6 calls vs 9.2 avg). Views held steady so it's a conversion gap, not a visibility issue. Most likely: profile missing business hours or a stale offer. Want me to run a quick audit + fix the 2-3 things most likely causing the drop? Reply YES.
rationale: Perf dip with precise delta framing; diagnoses root cause (conversion not visibility) to avoid alarm; effort externalization; single binary CTA.

body: Dr. Bharat, aapki subscription 14 din mein renew hoti hai. Is period mein aapne haasil kiya: 1,840 views, 12 calls, 5 new patient leads. Renewal se yeh momentum continue rahega — bina interruption ke. Reply YES to renew, STOP to pause.
rationale: Renewal anchored on real value delivered (views/calls/leads); Hindi framing per language preference; loss framing (momentum interrupted) without alarm; clean YES/STOP.

body: Studio11, Diwali is 4 days away — busiest gifting window of the year. 3 salons in Hyderabad ran a 'Diwali Glow' combo last week (facial + threading + nail art @ ₹999) and saw 2.3× their usual Tuesday footfall. Want me to draft the offer copy + a WhatsApp blast you can send by tonight? Reply YES.
rationale: Festival trigger with 4-day countdown; social proof (3 peer salons); specific combo offer format; effort externalization; urgency framing.

body: Hi Kavya 💍 Lakshmi from Studio11 Kapra here. 196 days to your wedding — perfect window to lock in your bridal skin-prep program before December slots fill up. ₹2,499 covers 4 sessions + take-home kit. Shall I block your preferred Saturday 4pm for the first session next week?
rationale: Customer bridal follow-up; days-to-wedding countdown creates urgency; preference honored (Sat 4pm from booking history); specific price and program structure; warm emoji usage appropriate for salons.

body: Ek curiosity question — Studio11 mein is mahine kaun sa service sabse zyada book ho rahi hai? Main dekh rahi hoon aapki 4.9★ rating is solid, aur Diwali ke baad usually bridal inquiries badh jaati hain. Sirf jaanna chahti thi aapke end se kya trending hai.
rationale: Curious-ask cadence; genuine question about business (not a pitch); Hindi-English mix; references their strong rating as social proof; opens conversation naturally.

body: Glamour Lounge, aapki profile 3 weeks se quiet hai — tab tak aapke locality mein salon searches 18% upar gayi hain (Pune summer season). 14 customers jo 6+ months se nahi aaye hain unhe ek 'We miss you' message bhejne se usually 20-25% wapas aate hain. Want me to draft 3 win-back messages right now? Reply YES.
rationale: Win-back with dormancy + local search trend + peer benchmark; loss framing (customers drifting); effort externalization; Hindi-English mix.

body: Pizza Junction — IPL tonight, Delhi vs Rajasthan, 7:30 PM! Last week's match evening brought 34% more orders than your Tuesday average. Run a match-day combo: Loaded Pizza + Garlic Bread + 2 Cokes @ ₹499. I can push it live on your magicpin listing right now and schedule a WhatsApp story. Reply YES?
rationale: IPL trigger with match-time, real historical data (34% lift), specific combo offer at concrete price, effort externalization (push live now); high urgency.

body: Pizza Junction, 4 reviews this week mentioned 'late delivery' — it's becoming a pattern your customers notice. Main do cheezein suggest karunga: (1) ek proactive SMS jab delivery 30+ min late ho, (2) ek ₹50 coupon for the next order. Small fix, big retention impact. Want me to draft both?
rationale: Review theme framing as insight not criticism; two specific fixes with low effort; Hindi framing; reciprocity (I noticed, thought you should know); open CTA allows conversation.

body: Mylari, you hit 500 Google reviews! 🎉 That's top 5% for Bangalore restaurants on magicpin. 3 things that usually follow a milestone like this: (1) a 'Thank You' post goes viral locally, (2) a 'Celebrating 500 Reviews' combo drives footfall, (3) Google algo gives your profile a temporary visibility boost. Want me to draft all 3 right now? Reply YES.
rationale: Milestone celebration with specific ranking context; 3-action plan gives social proof + algorithmic angle + revenue angle; effort externalization.

body: Mylari, aapne corporate thali ka plan discuss kiya tha. Main ek ready draft le aaya hoon: 'Corporate Lunch Thali @ ₹180 (min 20 pax, delivery 12-2pm, Koramangala-Indiranagar zone)'. Pricing, coverage, aur minimum order sab include hai. Just say YES aur main isse aapke listing pe live kar deta hoon + ek corporate outreach template bhi bhejta hoon.
rationale: Active planning intent; effort externalization (draft already ready); specific pricing/logistics anchored on locality; Hindi-English; forward momentum.

body: PowerHouse, January-March registrations typically dip 22% as New Year resolutions fade — you're seeing it now (views down 18% vs Dec peak). 2 things working for Bangalore gyms right now: (1) 'Bring a Friend' referral (existing members convert 3× better than cold acquisition), (2) a 6-month pre-summer challenge. Want me to design one of these campaigns? Reply YES.
rationale: Seasonal dip context with specific percentage; peer benchmark (Bangalore gyms); two concrete counter-seasonal tactics; effort externalization.

body: Hi Rashmi! Arjun from PowerHouse here 💪 It's been 8 months — we miss seeing you at the 6pm sessions. We just launched a 'Comeback Program': 3-month access @ ₹2,499 (vs regular ₹3,600) + a free PT session to ease back in. No pressure — want me to hold a slot for you this week?
rationale: Customer win-back; warm personal tone referencing their preferred session time; specific savings framing (vs regular price); no guilt; no pressure language; soft CTA.

body: Zen Yoga, kids summer yoga program — main ek complete draft ready kar chuka hoon: '30-day Kids Mindfulness Camp @ ₹3,500 (age 6-14, Jun 1 - Jun 30, 9-10am)'. Includes 24 sessions, a take-home mindfulness workbook, and a parent progress update. Just say YES aur main ise listing pe live kar deta hoon + ek school-outreach flyer bhi.
rationale: Active planning intent; complete program structure already drafted (effort externalization); age group, dates, pricing all specific; school-outreach flyer adds extra value.

body: Hi Karthik! Meera from Zen Yoga here 🧘 How did your trial class go? We'd love to hear! If you enjoyed it — our 3-month Kids Mindfulness package starts Jun 1: 24 sessions @ ₹3,500 (that's ₹146/session). First 10 registrations get a free mindfulness journal. Would you like me to hold a spot for Karthik?
rationale: Trial follow-up; warm name usage; per-session price breakdown makes value concrete; scarcity (first 10); soft open CTA lets parent decide without pressure.

body: Apollo Health Plus — atorvastatin 10mg (Atorva brand) supply alert from distributor: 2-week shortage expected from May 3. Patients on chronic therapy may need alternative brand (Lipitor/Tonact equivalent — same API, same dose). Want me to (1) list the equivalent SKUs in stock + (2) draft a pharmacist note for patients who come in? Reply YES.
rationale: Supply alert with specific drug, brand, timeline, and patient impact; offers concrete action (equivalents + patient note); pharmacies: reliable/calm tone; no alarm.

body: Namaste! Apollo Health Plus from Jaipur here. Aapke Dadaji ki next atorvastatin refill window aa gayi hai (monthly cycle). Aapke paas 3 options hain: (1) store pe aake le jayein, (2) hum ghar deliver kar dein (same day, Jaipur), (3) main repeat prescription ke liye doctor ke saath coordinate kar dun. Kaun sa option best rahega?
rationale: Chronic refill; 3 clear options reduces friction; home delivery option = effort externalization for elderly patient; warm Hindi-English tone appropriate; no pressure.

body: Apollo, summer demand shift alert: ORS sachet searches in Jaipur +40% this week, sunscreen SPF50+ up 28%. Patients are stocking up. 2 actions worth taking now: (1) front-rack ORS + electrolyte range, (2) add a 'Summer Essentials Kit' bundle (₹299: ORS×5 + sunscreen + eye drops). Want me to design the bundle description for your listing?
rationale: Category seasonal trigger with specific search trend data; two concrete actions + bundle idea at specific price; anticipates demand before it peaks.

body: Sunrise Medicos — aapka Google Business Profile abhi unverified hai, jiska matlab hai ki Lucknow mein 'pharmacy near me' searches mein aap show hi nahi ho rahe. Last month 2,400+ people ne nearby pharmacy search ki Hazratganj area mein. Verification mein sirf 5 minute lagte hain — main aapko step-by-step guide kar sakti hoon. Reply YES?
rationale: GBP unverified with specific local search volume data for loss aversion; 5-minute effort minimization; Hindi-English; direct business impact framing.

body: Dr. Meera, IDA Delhi is hosting a CDE webinar: 'Digital Workflow in Modern Restorative Dentistry' — May 14, 6:30pm, 2 CE credits, online. Registration closes May 10. Aapke implant + veneer case mix ke liye relevant hai (CAD/CAM workflow section especially). Want me to send you the registration link + block it in your calendar? Reply YES.
rationale: CDE opportunity with specific date/credits/deadline; anchored on Dr. Meera's case-mix (implant + veneer from her offer catalog); effort externalization (register + calendar); peer/clinical tone.

body: Dr. Meera, ek new dental clinic registered on Google Business Profile — 1.3 km from Lajpat Nagar, 4.2★ rating, 34 reviews. Aapki rating unse better hai (4.7★, 89 reviews) lekin aapka CTR peer median se neeche hai (2.1% vs 3.0%). Best defensive move: 3 fresh Google posts this week + reactivate your Deep Cleaning @ ₹499 offer. Want me to draft both now?
rationale: Competitor opened with specific distance and their stats; Dr. Meera's advantage highlighted first (not alarmist); specific CTR gap; two concrete defensive actions; effort externalization.

body: Zen Yoga, aapka profile kal 34% views spike dekha — aapke 30-day average se kaafi upar. Yeh momentum 48-72 ghante rehta hai. Abhi campaign chalane se maximum impact milega. Main 'Summer Mind-Body Reset' campaign draft kar sakta hoon — 3 posts + a WhatsApp offer — aur use aaj hi schedule kar sakta hoon. Reply YES?
rationale: Perf spike with exact delta; time-window urgency (48-72h); specific campaign name tied to seasonal context; effort externalization; Hindi-English mix.

body: Glamour Lounge, 18 din ho gaye bina kisi message ke — aur Pune mein beauty salon searches 14% upar hain is season mein. Ek genuine question: aapke yahan is month kaun sa service sabse zyada demand mein hai — bridal prep, or regular grooming? Main wahan se suggest kar sakti hoon ki Vera aapke liye kya useful kar sakti hai.
rationale: Dormancy re-engagement via curiosity question (not a pitch); seasonal local search data adds context; genuine question about their business; Hindi-English; no pressure.
